# Code of Conduct

Echo Isle uses a simple community rule: be kind, specific, and constructive.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful of other users and maintainers.
- Keep feedback focused on the product or documentation.
- Share enough detail to help reproduce issues.
- Assume good faith.
- Avoid posting private or sensitive information.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, threats, insults, or discriminatory language.
- Posting private data, credentials, private feed URLs, or personal information.
- Spam, repeated off-topic posts, or abusive issue creation.
- Requests to redistribute or misuse third-party podcast content.

Maintainers may edit, hide, lock, or remove content that violates this Code of Conduct.
